case_title: BENJAMIN STRAUCH EGGERS VS. MING ZHOU

docket_entries.description: COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF EGGERS, BENJAMIN STRAUCH
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,709.91 FILED BY EGGERS, BENJAMIN STRAUCH AS TO DEFENDANT ZHOU, MING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-04-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
